title: RateGuard Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the RateGuard AI-native rate limiting SDK. Valid across Go, Node.js, and Python SDKs.

preset.description: Preset name or alias. Aliases: free→dev, starter→standard, pro→high-throughput, business/enterprise→llm-heavy, streaming→streaming-llm, agent/multi-agent→agent-orchestrator, mcp→mcp-server

requestsPerSecond.description: Override preset RPS. 0 means use preset value.

burst.description: Override preset burst capacity. 0 means use preset value.

tokenBudgetPerHour.description: LLM token budget per hour. 0 means no hourly limit.

tokenBudgetMode.description: hard-stop: reject when budget exhausted. soft-stop: queue requests.

serviceName.description: OpenTelemetry service name for spans and metrics.

otlpCollectorEndpoint.description: OTLP gRPC collector endpoint for traces and metrics.

errorRateThreshold.description: Error rate that triggers circuit open (0.0-1.0).

openTimeout.description: How long the circuit stays open before half-open probe.

halfOpenSuccessesRequired.description: Successes needed to close circuit from half-open.

sampleSize.description: Rolling window size for error rate calculation.

tenantId.description: Multi-tenant identifier for rate limit key scoping.

routeId.description: Route identifier for per-endpoint rate limiting.

upstreamId.description: Upstream service identifier for circuit breaker scoping.

provider.description: LLM provider name for token budget key scoping.

model.description: LLM model name for cost estimation and budget scoping.

eventEndpoint.description: HTTP endpoint to POST rate limit events.

estimatedTokensPerRequest.description: Bounds the hard-stop token budget reservation per in-flight request. 0 reserves the entire remaining budget (never overshoots, but serializes concurrent requests on the same budget key). Set a realistic per-call estimate (e.g. 8000 for chat) to allow concurrency. Go SDK.

loopDetection.description: Enable agent loop detection for requests carrying an X-Sequence-Depth header. Detected loops return HTTP 429 with code loop_detected. Fingerprint comes from X-Payload-Fingerprint or SHA-256 of method+path+body. Go SDK.

loopMaxDepth.description: Maximum agent sequence depth before halting, regardless of fingerprint repeats. Go SDK.

maxBufferedResponseBytes.description: Cap on response body buffering for token usage extraction. Responses larger than the cap skip body-based extraction. Go SDK.
